description: Testing the layout and format compliance of the admin interface with design specifications.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify layout and format of Admin site
expected_result: - All layout and format are the same with design

description: Testing quiz creation functionality including question management, answer types, formatting, and pagination settings. Testing quiz configuration including pagination settings, duration, scoring, button customization, preview functionality, and publishing controls.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can create Quiz title successfully
expected_result:
- Success message displays
- Data is saved on DB

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when admin inputs invalid data for Quiz title:
- more than max length characters
- invalid data type
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can create question successfully
expected_result:
- Success message displays
- Data is saved on DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can create answer for question successfully
expected_result:
- Success message displays
- Data is saved on DB corresponding question

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when admin creates a question duplicated, it is existing in Quiz
expected_result:
- Error message displays
- No data is saved on DB

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can choose one/or more than one types of answer for question
[base on spec]
- Multi Choice
- Checkbox
- Radio button
- Single textbox
...
expected_result: - Format of answer displays corresponding type to input answers

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can set correct answer for each question corresponding type of answer
expected_result:
- Success message displays
- Data is saved on DB corresponding question

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can set Question related to each others

Eg: Question 1: Answer A | Answer B
- If user chooses Answer A => Go to Question 2
- If user chooses Answer B => Go to Question 5
expected_result:
- Question related is set successfully
- Data is saved on DB

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when inpputting invalid related Question 
- Question is not existing
- Question before itself
...
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when admin sets a duplicate answer for one question
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when admin does not set answer for question
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when admin does not set correct answer for question
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can set display format for question/answer
expected_result:
- Admin set display format for question/answer successfully
+ Font/Size
+ Color
+ Other format

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can update question/answer successfully
expected_result:
- Update infor successfully
- Data is updated on DB

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can delete question successfully
expected_result: - Delete question & answer respectively successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Admin can sort question/answer order by drag and drop
expected_result: - Question/Answer order is sorted correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Admin can set valid number of question on each page
expected_result: - The number of question on each page is set correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the number of question on each page is 1 question default when admin does not set
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- The number of question on each page default is 1 question
[base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message display when inputting invalid data for  number of question on each page:
- incorrect data type
- negative number / equal 0
- more than max value number question on each page [base on spec]
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can setting valid duration for Quiz successfully
expected_result: - Time for Quiz is set successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify error message displays when admin lets duration empty
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message display when inputting invalid data for duration:
- incorrect data type
- less than min time required
- more than max time required
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can setting name of buttons on Quiz
- Done Button
- Previous Button
- Next Button
expected_result: - All button displays correct name

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can set valid score for each question successfully
[base on spec]
expected_result: - Score of each question is set successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when admin lets score of question empty
[base on spec]
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message display when inputting invalid data for score:
- incorrect data type
- negative number / equal 0
- more than max score
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can set valid score or correct answer percent to Pass Quiz successfully
[base on spec]
expected_result: - Score or correct answer percent to Pass Quiz is set successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when admin lets score or correct answer percent to Pass Quiz empty
[base on spec]
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message display when inputting invalid data for score or correct answer percent to Pass Quiz:
- incorrect data type
- negative number / equal 0
- more than total score of all questions
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify preview quiz page displays correctly
expected_result: - Preview Quiz page displays corresponding design of admin

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can save Quiz successfully
expected_result: - All infor of quiz is saved on DB correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can setting valid time to public Quiz successfully
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Time to publish Quiz is set correctly
- Status of Quiz is Waiting to public

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Quiz is published automatically when publish time has comming
expected_result:
- Quiz is published automatically
- Status of Quiz is Published

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message display when inputting invalid data for time to public Quiz:
- incorrect data type
- time in the past
- time FROM >= time TO
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Quiz is published immediately if admin does not set time to published
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Time to publish Quiz is set correctly
- Status of Quiz is Published

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can unpublished Quiz for any editing successfully
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Status of Quiz is Editing (Draft)
- User can not access Quiz

description: Testing quiz editing functionality including validation, publishing state management, user answer handling, and role-based access control.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can Edit Quiz successfully with all valid data in Editing (Draft) mode
expected_result:
- Quiz infor is updated successfully
- Data is updated on DB correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify error message displays when admin edit Quiz with any invalid data for any fields

- Refer validation on Create Quiz function
expected_result: - Error message displays

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can not Edit Quiz when it is publishing
expected_result:
- Admin can not update anything in published/waiting to publish mode
[base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Answer of user is updated when admin edit Quiz in case user had done Quiz before
expected_result:
[base on spec]
- Deleted answer of deleted Question
- Set answer is NULL for Added Question
- Update value of answer when changing order or content

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can Delete Quiz successfully
expected_result: - All infor of quiz is deleted successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can set Roles can be access the Quiz successfully
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Access Roles can access the Quiz when it's published
- Un-access Roles can not access the Quiz anytime, Error message displays

description: Testing result management functionality including viewing user results, export capabilities, and statistical analysis.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can view all result of users
- user infor
- quiz progress
- result of quiz
expected_result: - All infor and result of user displays correctly on screen

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify admin can not edit any information of user
expected_result: - User infor displays in readonly mode, can not edit

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can/can not Edit Quiz result of user
[base on spec]
expected_result:
- Quiz result is updated/is not updated
[base on spec]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can export quiz result

Refer to "Export File" checklist for mor details
expected_result: - Quiz result is exported correctly

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify admin can do more additional actions to result statistics
- filter results
- result statistics by percent of Failure/Pass
.....
[base on spec]
expected_result: - All action is implemented correctly
